'''hapuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ofcr|ofcr]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ofcr|ofcr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hapuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæpihith|hæpihith]] || [[word:hæpihij|hæpihij]] || [[word:hæpihish|hæpihish]] || [[word:hæpihi|hæpihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hapupuhuth|hapupuhuth]] || [[word:hapupuhuj|hapupuhuj]] || [[word:hapupuhush|hapupuhush]] || [[word:hapupuhu|hapupuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hapuhuth|hapuhuth]] || [[word:hapuhuj|hapuhuj]] || [[word:hapuhush|hapuhush]] || [[word:hapuhu|hapuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hapufhuth|hapufhuth]] || [[word:hapufhuj|hapufhuj]] || [[word:hapufhush|hapufhush]] || [[word:hapufhuf|hapufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hapuhuthu|hapuhuthu]] || [[word:hapuhuju|hapuhuju]] || [[word:hapuhushu|hapuhushu]] || [[word:hapuhuku|hapuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hapuhuth|hapuhuth]] || [[word:hapuhuj|hapuhuj]] || [[word:hapuhush|hapuhush]] || [[word:hapuhu|hapuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hapuhuthul|hapuhuthul]] || [[word:hapuhujul|hapuhujul]] || [[word:hapuhushul|hapuhushul]] || [[word:hapuhukul|hapuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hapuhuthuthu|hapuhuthuthu]] || [[word:hapuhujuju|hapuhujuju]] || [[word:hapuhushushu|hapuhushushu]] || [[word:hapuhuku|hapuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hapuhuthun|hapuhuthun]] || [[word:hapuhujun|hapuhujun]] || [[word:hapuhushun|hapuhushun]] || [[word:hapuhukun|hapuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hapuhuthuoro|hapuhuthuoro]] || [[word:hapuhujuoro|hapuhujuoro]] || [[word:hapuhushuoro|hapuhushuoro]] || [[word:hapuhukuoro|hapuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
